meta.siteDescription: Archicad add-ons for terrain, landscape, shells, and BIM workflows.

home.heroTitle: Archicad tools that work on real projects
home.heroSubtitle: Add-ons for terrain import, landscape automation, shells on topo, and model data — built by a practicing architect and Registered API Developer.
home.catalogLead: 11 functional blocks — terrain, landscape, shells, markup, and BIM data. Each links to its product package.
home.whoLead: Practicing architect. Registered Graphisoft API Developer. Tools born from daily Archicad work — not concept demos.

manufacturers.title: GDL libraries for manufacturers
manufacturers.lead: Turn your product catalog into Archicad-ready GDL objects — parametric, documented, and maintainable across AC versions.
bullets: Parametric GDL from your CAD or product data
Versioning and update workflow for your sales team
Compatibility testing on target Archicad releases

custom.title: Custom Archicad development
custom.lead: Need a workflow that does not exist yet? Add-ons, palettes, and automation tailored to your bureau or product line.
bullets: Discovery on your real project files
API Development Kit, C++ add-ons and palettes
Delivery with docs, installer, and support window

about.title: About
about.lead: Nordlab — independent Archicad development by a practicing architect.
about.body: I design and build add-ons used on live projects: terrain from DWG, landscape distribution, shells on mesh, selection tables, and batch ID workflows. Registered Graphisoft API Developer. Archicad 27–29, Windows.

contact.ctaLead: Questions, quotes, or a demo on your files.
